torch_pattern: out = torch.matmul(x, weight); out = out + bias if bias is not None else out; out = fused_activation(out) if fused_activation is not None else out; outputs = torch.chunk(out, chunks, dim=-1)
weight_transform: weight kept as single fused [K, N] matrix; split is performed on the matmul output along dim=-1 rather than pre-splitting weights
applicability_notes: Fuses linear (matmul + optional bias + optional activation) with an output chunk/split along the last dim into a single op; torch_pattern reconstructed from call-site semantics since no registered golden/tests were provided

placement_observations.size_descriptor: M x K (post all-gather activation in model call site)
placement_observations.program_config: matmul_config = get_matmul_config(M, K, N, core_grid, default_block_size) with subblock_h={SB_H}, subblock_w={SB_W}, compute_with_storage_grid_size={CORE_GRID}
